step_description: Top SQL by elapsed time and buffer gets
narrative_hint: SQL_ID 8fk2m9vbqt3dx is massively dominant — 450,112 buffer gets and 82,304 disk reads across 412 executions. Average elapsed of 447ms is extremely high for an OLTP query. The 82K disk reads strongly suggest a full table scan bypassing the buffer cache. Claude should identify this as the root cause and recommend sql_execution_plan to confirm the access path, while suggesting active_locks and redo_log_activity can be safely skipped as there was no evidence of those patterns in step 1.
